steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined phrase — "particularly at a time when the manufacturing of new television sets was stalled due to the US's involvement in World War II" — within the text as a whole. The word "particularly" signals that this phrase elaborates on the preceding claim that advertisers hesitated to invest in TV.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — It explains why a type of television programming was popular at the time.: The underlined phrase says nothing about programming or its popularity — it addresses manufacturing delays and advertiser hesitance. Wrong subject entirely. ✗
  • Choice B — It compares the beginnings of radio programming with the beginnings of television programming in the United States.: The passage mentions radio in the sentence before, but the underlined phrase itself makes no comparison between radio and TV origins. That connection is not in the underlined text. ✗
  • Choice C — It describes how broadcasters attempted to convince advertisers to support television.: Broadcasters' persuasion efforts are described in the following sentence, not in the underlined phrase. The underlined phrase explains the obstacle, not the response to it. ✗
  • Choice D — It identifies a specific reason behind some advertisers' hesitance to support television.: The underlined phrase names a concrete obstacle — WWII stalled TV manufacturing — that explains why advertisers were reluctant. This is exactly what "particularly" introduces. ✓
That is the correct answer.
